城牆：點起點→再點終點＝沿格連建一段: Wall: tap a start tile, then an end tile to lay a run
已選起點，點終點連建（點他處取消）: Start set — tap the end tile (tap elsewhere to cancel)
點放置城門（↻ 或 R 鍵旋轉 橫/直，貼合牆向）: Tap to place the gate (↻ or R rotates it to match the wall)
拆除模式：點自己的建築拆除（施工中全退、蓋好回收半額×血量）: Demolish: tap one of your buildings (full refund while under construction, half × remaining HP once finished)
回收 {r}（剩 {p}% 血量，受損遞減）: Recovers {r} (at {p}% HP — damage lowers the refund)
城門：我方可通行、敵方需破壞: Gate: yours pass through, the enemy has to break it
光環治療範圍 {r}（範圍內生物 +{h}/秒）: Healing aura {r} (+{h}/s to living units inside)
首都已淪陷，可於建造列重建: Your capital has fallen — rebuild it from the build bar
唯讀檢視（給玩家參考） 亮＝本文明啟用、暗 🔒＝上鎖 ★＝文明掛接點（互斥分支）: Reference view.　Lit = available to this civilisation, dim 🔒 = locked.　★ = civilisation branch point (mutually exclusive)
需 研發≥1·建築≥1·合計≥{n}（目前 研{rt}·建{rb}）: Needs ≥1 research, ≥1 building, ≥{n} together (now: {rt} research, {rb} buildings)
已研發互斥科技·無法選此文明: A mutually exclusive research is already done — this civilisation is no longer available
此兵種需先研發解鎖: This unit has to be unlocked by research first
已研發互斥科技（★），無法切換到此文明: A mutually exclusive research (★) is already done — you cannot switch to this civilisation
開拓中心已升級為都市（後備命 +1）: Outpost upgraded to a city (+1 backup life)
⚠️ 首都淪陷！由都市續戰——可重建首都: ⚠️ Capital lost — your cities keep you in the game. You can rebuild it
{r}（我方側）已採盡，人力轉往其他資源: {r} on your side is exhausted — villagers moved to other resources
工地在敵方防禦火圈內·村民不會自動前往（改用死採姿態或手動拖過去）: That site sits inside enemy defensive fire — villagers will not walk in on their own (set them to keep working, or drag them there)
缺糧中，軍事生產暫停: Out of food — military production paused
我方受襲！（小地圖紅圈）: You are under attack! (red ring on the minimap)
威脅解除，村民復工: Threat gone — villagers back to work
不能拆最後的指揮中樞: You cannot demolish your last command centre
進駐容量不足，部分單位留在外面: Not enough room — some units stayed outside
建築危急，進駐單位緊急撒出！: Building critical — the garrison is bailing out!
⚠️ 軍糧耗盡！警告 {n}/3（第 3 次起軍隊降效）: ⚠️ Out of food! Warning {n}/3 (the army weakens from the third)
⚠️ 缺糧！軍隊效率 −25%、軍事生產暫停（村民/斥候不受影響）: ⚠️ Starving! Army −25%, military production paused (villagers and scouts unaffected)
勝利！敵方指揮中樞（首都＋都市）全數摧毀: Victory! Every enemy command centre — capital and cities — is destroyed
敗北…首都與所有都市淪陷: Defeat… your capital and every city has fallen
標準陸戰：雙高地＋側翼林＋中段無人區（R8 放大版·現行基線圖）: The standard land map: two plateaus, flanking woods and an open no-man's-land in the middle.
中央湖隔開左右＋湖心島＋兩岸淺灘渡口（海軍可封鎖的咽喉）＝經濟與海戰一局（202: A central lake splits the map, with an island and shallow fords a navy can blockade — economy and sea war in one game.
全平地無地物·基地較近·資源貼家＝純戰鬥/兵種驗證（自動對戰平衡輪第①層擂台）: Flat and featureless, bases close together, resources at home — a pure fight.
無高地、只有零星林·資源豐厚分散＝經濟營運與擴張驗證（平衡輪第②層）: No high ground and only scattered woods, with rich resources spread wide — an economic map.
高地/坡道/林隘口密集·中央高地控制點＝地形與視野戰驗證（平衡輪第③層）: Dense plateaus, ramps and wooded chokepoints around a central height — terrain and sight lines decide it.
市場匯率損耗減半、收窄買賣價差（降低抽成·商業線）: Halves market slippage and narrows the buy/sell spread
石/鐵採集 +25%、鐵礦緩慢再生（礦業線）: Stone and iron +25%; iron veins slowly regenerate
攻或防 再 +1（需對應 I）: Another +1 to attack or defence (needs the matching I)
攻防 III、攻城傷害 +25%（重裝線）: Attack and defence III, siege damage +25%
相剋傷害 +15%、打帶跑射後加速（射後提速＋閃避↑）（戰術線）: Counter damage +15%; kiting units accelerate after each shot and dodge better
騎乘兵移速 +20%（騎兵/弓騎·機動線）: Mounted units move 20% faster (cavalry and horse archers)
蒙古 騎士晚期：弓騎命中大增（馬術宗師·抵銷馬背射擊懲罰 0.75→0.95）: Mongol, Late Knights: horse archers nearly shed the mounted-fire penalty (0.75 → 0.95)
英格蘭 騎士晚期：弓系箭無視半數敵遠防（弓兵壓制升級）: England, Late Knights: bow fire ignores half of the target's ranged defence
蒙古 劫掠線：弓騎焚燒農田/萌芽林/漁籠的傷害再 ×1.5（chevauchée: Mongol raiding: horse archers do ×1.5 damage burning farms, coppices and fish traps
建築視野 +2、殘影保留 ×2、敵開火暴露延長（偵察線）: Building sight +2, remembered enemies linger twice as long, and firing exposes the enemy for longer
